_title: BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 — Collaborative production of architectural, engineering and construction information

_amendments.summary: Clarifications to status codes and revision conventions
Updated to align with ISO 19650 series; superseded BS 1192-5 layering by reference to ISO 13567

note: BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 has been largely superseded by the ISO 19650 series in the UK (since 2018) but remains the canonical reference for the layer-naming convention and Common Data Environment (CDE) practices in many UK projects. ISO 19650-1/-2 retain the BS 1192 information management framework with updated naming.
scope: Collaborative production of architectural, engineering and construction information — code of practice. Covers Common Data Environment, file naming, layer naming, revision conventions, status/suitability codes.

structure.section6: Layer naming convention (Role-Discipline-Number-Type / referenced from ISO 13567)

key_references_in_this_folder.file-naming.json: §7 — File naming convention with discipline + originator codes
key_references_in_this_folder.project-codes.json: §7 — Discipline single-character codes (A/C/E/M/P/S/W) + originator code convention
key_references_in_this_folder.cad-layers.json: Skills-layer abstract layout_group → BS 1192 concrete CAD layer code mapping (consumed by SLD v1.5+ runtime renderer)
